events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the only photo of the transmitter is obscured by packaging and glare, the identity and connection details can't be verified — I flagged `decision: needs_more_info` with low risk (no visible hazard, just insufficient documentation), and listed corrective actions (re-photograph without packaging/glare, verify nameplate against the instrument index) before this can be dispositioned as pass or fail.
